content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Chewbaсca and Number". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/514/problem/A
content.outputFormat: The smallest number that is greater than N and has the same number of 1 bits in its binary representation as N

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use bit manipulation to count the number of 1 bits in N, then increment N until we find a number with the same number of 1 bits

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
cnt = bin(n).count('1')
while True:
    n += 1
    if bin(n).count('1') == cnt:
        print(n)
        break
